data.body: PASS-1 review note (T1 prior-art/novel-architecture) — for the workflow-engine remediation epic. The plan crosses several T1 bright-lines (visual-editing technology adoption, a migration, novel-architecture re-validation), and substantial in-repo prior art already resolves much of what the workstreams pose as open. Detailed checklist findings filed in the structured review output; summary: WS-VISUAL/WS-VALIDATE appear to overlook a shipped BPMN/bpmn-js editor (docs/workflow-editor.md, src/rebar/llm/workflow/{bpmn,editor}.py), WS-MIGRATE's fan-out caveat is addressed by map_fanout.py + ADR 0003, and the gate-migration is already an Accepted ADR.
